RailSwap
HomeBrowse Tickets
India's first railway ticket exchange

Don't let your railway ticket go to waste

Sell your unused Indian Railways tickets and help fellow passengers find seats. Fast, simple, and direct contact.

Find Tickets

Leave blank to browse all available tickets

How it works

Three simple steps to exchange your ticket

🎫
01

List your ticket

Add your unused ticket details — train, date, route, and passenger info. Takes less than 2 minutes.

🔍
02

Buyer finds it

Passengers searching for your route will find your listing and see your contact details.

📱
03

Connect directly

Buyer contacts you directly via mobile number. Settle the deal your way — no middlemen.

All train classes

SL, 3A, 2A, 1A, CC, EC and more

Google verified

Only signed-in users can list tickets

Direct contact

Call or message the seller directly

Have an unused ticket?

List it in under 2 minutes and recover your cost. Hundreds of passengers are searching for tickets every day.

RailSwap
